itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description: Your journey to the heart of Vietnam begins the moment you land at Noi Bai International Airport in Hanoi. As you disembark, our friendly guide will be there to extend a warm welcome. Keep an eye out for our distinctive Asia Tour Advisor logo along with your name – a sign that you're in capable hands. We'll whisk you away to your hotel, ensuring your comfort, and providing an initial introduction to this vibrant city. The remainder of the day is yours to settle in, unwind, and explore at your leisure.
activities: Hanoi, with its population of seven million, stands as Vietnam's capital. This ancient city, steeped in tradition and adorned with French colonial architecture, boasts tree-lined boulevards, serene la
Please note that check-in time is from 14:00, with early check-in subject to room availability.

itinerary.title: Sightseeing of Hanoi
itinerary.description: Your day commences with a delightful breakfast at your hotel, setting the stage for a captivating exploration of Vietnam's capital city, Hanoi. With a history stretching back over 1,000 years, this city is a treasure trove of cultural and historical wonders.
activities: Your tour will encompass visits to prominent sites such as the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, the final resting place of the revered "Uncle Ho." The delicate One Pillar Pagoda, the ancient Tran Quoc Temple, a

After a delicious lunch, you can choose to explore the Temple of Literature, where you'll encounter ancient Vietnamese relics. Alternatively, delve into the intriguing history of Hoa Lo Prison or visi

itinerary.title: Hanoi – Pu Luong
itinerary.description: Morning: The day begins with a picturesque drive through a breathtaking mountain pass that offers a panoramic view of the entire valley. Your journey will lead you to your accommodation, where a delicious lunch awaits. Here, you'll have ample free time to explore the retreat's beauty, soaking in panoramic views and the serenity of this tranquil setting.
activities: Afternoon: You'll be transferred to a location approximately 12 km from the retreat, where your trek commences. This adventure will lead you to a suspension bridge over the Cham River, with subsequent
Your journey will take you to Chieng Lau village, where you can pause and savor the tranquility of the streamside scenery. From there, you'll continue on to the main road, where transportation awaits

itinerary.title: Puluong Discovery
itinerary.description: Morning: Rise early and embark on a descent into the captivating valley facing the retreat. Here, you'll traverse tumbling rice terraces, meandering along small paths enveloped in lush vegetation. The path gradually reveals a picturesque village nestled at the base of a majestic mountain, a scene worthy of your camera's continuous attention.
activities: Afternoon: Continuing your journey to the valley's base, you'll navigate through roads and farmland, villages and wild fields, ponds and rivers, mountains and open lands. Along this picturesque route,

Following your nourishing meal, you'll have free time to enjoy the refreshing waters of the nearby river. Later, you'll return to the designated pick-up point for transfer back to the Pu Luong Retreat

itinerary.title: Puluong – Life and community of the Village
itinerary.description: Morning: Today offers a unique opportunity to immerse yourself in village life and engage with the locals who call the hills above the retreat home. Gain insights into daily life as you stroll through working farmlands, traverse rice fields, and learn about the colorful textile weaving process. Afterward, indulge in a satisfying lunch at the Lodge.
activities: Afternoon: Bid farewell to the Lodge and depart from Pu Luong, heading back to Hanoi. Upon your arrival in Hanoi, check in at the hotel, where you can relax and rejuvenate.

itinerary.title: Hanoi – Halong bay
itinerary.description: Your adventure continues as you depart from Hanoi. We'll pick you up at your hotel, embarking on a journey through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta. Your destination: the renowned UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay. Here, you'll board a luxurious junk ship for an enchanting overnight cruise.
activities: As you relax on board, you'll be captivated by the astounding limestone karsts that rise majestically from the sea. Thousands of lush, jungle-covered islands appear to float on the serene waves of the

A sumptuous seafood feast awaits you as you bask in the mesmerizing views with a drink in hand. Your voyage will take you to a traditional fishing village, where the locals have ingeniously created an

itinerary.title: Halong Bay – return to Hanoi Airport
itinerary.description: The day begins with a serene Tai Chi class on deck, surrounded by the early morning mist. Alternatively, you can simply relish the beauty of the bay as the sun rises over its azure waters. Choose from an excursion to a secluded island with a pristine sandy beach, ideal for a refreshing swim, or participate in a cooking demonstration with the ship's chef to further your understanding of Vietnamese cuisine.
activities: Indulge in a leisurely brunch while your junk gracefully sails through Halong Bay, passing by islets and caves as it makes its way back to the dock. Upon disembarkation, your driver will be ready to m
(Alternatively, should your flight depart early the next day, we can return you to Hanoi, including an additional night's stay at a Hanoi hotel.)
